name: DOGS OF WAR | An 18th Century Thriller
description:
"How beautiful it is...to see the mad dogs of war fight into battle with such zealousness. War, is truly a bloody art form."

-anon

[Dogs of War - An 18th Century MLM war drama where you - lead the role of a rising omega general star.]

____________________________

War has broken out, again. The Kingdom of the Swedes after domination in the First Baltic war has been invaded by her jealous neighbors - the Tsardom of Vladimir and the Principalite Republic of Polonia. Citizens panic, the city of Hannävr flee, some enlist to defend, but the enemy is quickly approaching.

Then, a courier arrives. A word from Jarlhavn - the king urges you to his Imperial palace in a ceremony, to officially promote you as the realm's youngest ever general.

Will you have the guts to prove your military intuition, or fall under the greviances of the parasitic alpha/beta/omega nobles? Choose quickly, war waits for no one.

__________________

TAGS: 18th century, dark romance, omegaverse, BL, yaoi, drama
